stories.title: 'I can't promise you minutes': What OKC *did* prom...
stories.summary: Isaiah Hartenstein and Alex Caruso were the final pieces of the Thunder's championship roster, playing specific roles to level up Oklahoma City.

stories.title: Victor Wembanyama is shattering the NBA's age curv...
stories.summary: The Spurs' young superstar is defying conventional wisdom about the importance of playoff experience.

stories.title: 911: Busch coughing up blood day before death
stories.summary: NASCAR driver Kyle Busch experienced shortness of breath, felt he was overheating and was coughing up blood the day before his death, according to a 911 call obtained Friday by The Associated Press.

stories.title: NCAA opened Ole Miss probe after Dabo complaint
stories.summary: The NCAA enforcement staff opened an investigation of the Ole Miss football program the same day that Clemson coach Dabo Swinney accused Rebels coach Pete Golding of tampering with linebacker Luke Ferrelli.

stories.title: Ronaldo, Canelo 1-2 on Forbes highest paid list
stories.summary: Boxing superstar Canelo Alvarez is listed second on Forbes' list of highest-paid athletes behind soccer star Cristiano Ronaldo.
